nodes.label: What is Kissflow
nodes.snippet: Kissflow is a work platform that lets you build apps, automate workflows, and manage work without writing code. It spans Apps, Processes, Boards, Integrations, an AI Builder, and Analytics.

nodes.label: Signing in to Kissflow
nodes.snippet: How to sign in to your Kissflow account using email, SSO, or the mobile app. You need a Kissflow account (your admin sends an invitation email) and a supported browser.

nodes.label: Homepage overview
nodes.snippet: Your homepage is the first thing you see after signing in — search, notifications, the Ask AI agent, and a widget dashboard you can make your own.

nodes.label: Quickstart for end users
nodes.snippet: Learn to submit forms, track items, and approve tasks in Kissflow. You'll navigate to your apps, submit a form, track your items, and approve a task.

nodes.label: Quickstart for builders
nodes.snippet: Build your first app with Kissflow's no-code tools and AI. You'll create a new app, design a page with drag-and-drop, build a form, set up a workflow, and deploy your app.

nodes.label: Quickstart for admins
nodes.snippet: Set up your Kissflow account — add users, configure security, and manage governance. You'll review account settings, add users and groups, configure SSO, set up governance policies, and manage environments.

nodes.label: Quickstart for developers
nodes.snippet: Make your first API call and build a custom component with the Kissflow SDK. You'll generate an API key, make your first REST API call, install the SDK, and build a custom component.

nodes.label: API and SDK documentation
nodes.snippet: Kissflow's API reference and SDK documentation are maintained on the Kissflow developer portal. Use the REST APIs for apps, boards, and processes, and the SDK to build custom components in JavaScript.
